testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-in Endpoint
testcase.name: should allow valid check-in

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-in Endpoint
testcase.name: should include rate limit headers

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-in Endpoint
testcase.name: should enforce rate limit (10 per 60 seconds)

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-in Endpoint
testcase.name: should include response time header

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-out Endpoint
testcase.name: should allow valid check-out

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-out Endpoint
testcase.name: should enforce rate limit separately from check-in

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Check-out Endpoint
testcase.name: should allow 10 check-outs per 60 seconds

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Caching - GET Attendance
testcase.name: should cache GET responses

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Caching - GET Attendance
testcase.name: should serve cached data faster

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Cache Invalidation - Write Operations
testcase.name: should invalidate cache on sync

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Performance Metrics
testcase.name: should track response times

testcase.classname: Attendance Endpoints - Integration Tests › Performance Metrics
testcase.name: should calculate percentiles

testcase.classname: Concurrency & Race Conditions
testcase.name: should handle concurrent check-ins

testcase.classname: Concurrency & Race Conditions
testcase.name: should handle concurrent reads with cache

testcase.classname: Concurrency & Race Conditions
testcase.name: should handle concurrent check-in and check-out

testcase.classname: Error Handling
testcase.name: should handle missing user

testcase.classname: Error Handling
testcase.name: should handle invalid JSON

testcase.classname: Error Handling
testcase.name: should handle missing request body

testcase.classname: Edge Cases
testcase.name: should handle very fast consecutive requests

testcase.classname: Edge Cases
testcase.name: should handle requests with large payloads

testcase.classname: Edge Cases
testcase.name: should handle cache with different query parameters
